title: Huh?
description: Make a 'Huh' sound when you are confused.
body:
Pressing the "H" key (default) causes the player to say "_Huh?_" sounds.

This is a **client only** Mod, which means you can enter the vanilla/mod server without installing this Mod (of course, others need to install this Mod to hear your _Huh?_).

_**I hope this mod can add some fun to your game :)**_


按下"H"键(默认)会使玩家说"_Huh?_"的声音.

这是一个**仅限客户端**的Mod, 这意味着您可以在不安装此Mod的情况下进入原版/Mod服务器 (当然, 其他人需要安装此Mod才能听到您的_Huh?_).

**_玩的开心:)_**
